summary: The endpoint-domain-and-schema task is complete in substance. Prisma/SQLite dependencies, config, migrations, client setup, deterministic db:prepare, idempotent seed defaults, generated schema docs, and repeatability coverage are present. The required deterministic checks are recorded as passing. The active task file has already been moved to docs/exec-plans/completed/001-endpoint-domain-and-schema.md, and state/current-task.txt points to the next task.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare creates/updates SQLite runtime state using Prisma migrations, client generation, and seed execution.
db:prepare repeatability is covered by a unit test that runs the command twice against an isolated SQLite database and verifies singular seed rows.
The Prisma schema represents endpoint names, titles/descriptions, enabled state, parameters, response cases, default responses, delete codes, timestamps, and basic failure config fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, ResponseCase, runtime DB, and seed-default shape.
Recorded required checks passed: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.
